title: Director, Strategy & Transformation
jd_text:
We are supporting a confidential Abu Dhabi-based entity on the appointment of a Director, Strategy & Transformation, playing a key role in shaping enterprise-wide strategic priorities.

Role:

Lead the development and execution of group-level strategy aligned to long-term organisational and national objectives

Drive cross-functional transformation initiatives across complex, multi-entity structures

Partner closely with senior leadership to define performance frameworks, governance, and delivery models

Support strategic decision-making through data-led insights and scenario planning

Engage with internal and external stakeholders across a high-visibility environment

Candidate Profile:

15+ years’ experience within Tier 1 / Tier 2 consulting firms, OR

Large government / semi-government organisations, OR

Multinational corporates operating at scale

Proven experience delivering enterprise-wide transformation or strategy programmes

Strong stakeholder management at senior leadership level

Ability to operate effectively in ambiguous, evolving environments

Opportunity:

This is a high-impact role offering exposure to strategic initiatives of national importance, within an organisation undergoing significant growth and transformation.

***Please note that due to the high volume of applications we receive, we are only able to respond to shortlisted candidates***
